{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

# Table: decision_talbe

HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier

EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number

Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description
MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Meter Reading reason (INTEGER) Meter reading reason code
MR Reason - Text (TEXT) Meter reading reason description

Meter Reading unit (TEXT) Meter reading unit
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1 (INTEGER) Secondary/duplicate Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Installation type (TEXT) Type of installation
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date
SPARTE_TEXT (TEXT) Division/sector description
AKLASSE (TEXT) Customer class code

BRANCHE (TEXT) Industry/sector code
BRANCHE_TEXT (TEXT) Industry/sector description
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name IN ('decision_table','decision_talbe');

CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS
WITH base AS (
    SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'
), haus_counts AS (
    SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count
    FROM base
    GROUP BY HAUS
), with_decision AS (
    SELECT 
        b.*, 
        CASE 
            WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'
            ELSE 'EVU'
        END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG
    FROM base b
    LEFT JOIN haus_counts hc ON b.HAUS = hc.HAUS
), overrides AS (
    SELECT 
        wd.*,
        CASE 
            WHEN wd.HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
            WHEN wd.HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'
            WHEN wd.HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU'
            WHEN wd.CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') OR wd.CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU'
            ELSE wd.ENTSCHEIDUNG
        END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG2
    FROM with_decision wd
), eablg_join AS (
    SELECT 
        o.HAUS, o.ANLAGE, o.ABLEINH, o.TOUR, o.ME_MA_ID, o.CITY1, o.CITY2, o.HOUSE_NUM1, o.POST_CODE1,
        o.EQUNR, o.ENTSCHEIDUNG2 AS ENTSCHEIDUNG,
        eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
    FROM overrides o
    LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON o.ANLAGE = eg.Installation
), merged_master AS (
    SELECT 
        ej.*,
        CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE,
        CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
        CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
        CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET,
        CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
        CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS MASTER_POST_CODE1,
        CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS MASTER_CITY1,
        CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS MASTER_CITY2,
        CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
    FROM eablg_join ej
    LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON ej.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR
    LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON ej.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR
), mandatory_eq AS (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
      AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
), direct_eq AS (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
      AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
)
SELECT 
    mm."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    mm.HAUS,
    mm.ANLAGE,
    mm.ME_MA_ID,
    mm.EQUNR,
    mm.HOUSE_NUM1,
    CASE 
        WHEN me.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN 'MANDATORY_READING'
        WHEN de.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN 'DIRECT_MAIL'
        ELSE mm.ENTSCHEIDUNG
    END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    mm.TITLE,
    mm.FORENAME,
    mm.SURNAME,
    mm.STREET,
    mm.STREETNO,
    mm.MASTER_POST_CODE1 AS POST_CODE1,
    mm.MASTER_CITY1 AS CITY1,
    mm.MASTER_CITY2 AS CITY2,
    mm.EMAIL
FROM merged_master mm
LEFT JOIN mandatory_eq me ON mm.EQUNR = me.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN direct_eq de ON mm.EQUNR = de.EQUNR;

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')

args.email: Please find attached the J09D mandatory reading entries for internal team processing.
Please find attached the J09D meter reading entries for EVU team processing.

kwargs.content:
Process J09D completed.

Results:
- MANDATORY_READING export: 1,199 rows
- DIRECT_MAIL export: 6,661 rows
- Remaining export: 19,773 rows

Actions completed:
- Created and processed temporary table
- Exported:
  - J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv
  - J09D_DIRECT_MAIL.csv
  - J09D.csv
- Sent J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv to mandatory.reading@provider.com
- Sent 6,661 direct emails via bulk mail service
- Sent J09D.csv to meter.readings@evu.com
- Deleted temporary table
